title: Glow Ores
description: A resource pack that makes all ores glow in-game, requires Continuity/Optifine
body:
# ✨ Glow Ores – Bright & Easy to Find!

**Glow Ores** is a **Minecraft resource pack** that makes all ores **glow and shine**, so you can **spot them easily in caves** — perfect for mining adventures!

![glowing ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10a09f58bd1d4fdca013f4e76319d23df73b9605.png)

---

## 💎 Features

* Ores glow brightly in the dark
* Works with **OptiFine** or **Continuity**
* Supports **all major Minecraft versions**
* Lightweight and lag-free

---

## ⚙️ How to Use

1. Download the **Glow Ores** pack
2. Move it to your `resourcepacks` folder
3. Enable it in Minecraft settings

[![Fast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)
